changeSet.author: myunmgan
changeSet.rollback: DROP VIEW IF EXISTS v_meetings_clients; DROP VIEW IF EXISTS v_meetings_by_day;

changeSet.author: myunmgan
changeSet.rollback: DROP VIEW v_meetings_clients; DROP VIEW v_meetings_by_day;

changeSet.author: agelfman
changeSet.sql: -- ============================================ -- ФЕВРАЛЬ 2026 (ПРЕДЫДУЩИЙ месяц) -- ============================================ -- 1000055: Весь день (00:00-23:59) - 5 февраля UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) - INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '5 days', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) - INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '5 days' + INTERVAL '23 hours 59 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000055; -- 1000056: Несколько дней (9-13 февраля, 5 дней) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) - INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '9 days', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) - INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '13 days' + INTERVAL '23 hours 59 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000056; -- 1000057: 1.5 часа (10 февраля, 10:00-11:30) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) - INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '10 days' + INTERVAL '10 hours', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) - INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '10 days' + INTERVAL '11 hours 30 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000057; -- 1000058: 2 часа (18 февраля, 14:00-16:00) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) - INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '18 days' + INTERVAL '14 hours', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) - INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '18 days' + INTERVAL '16 hours', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000058; -- 1000059: 1.5 часа (25 февраля, 09:30-11:00) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) - INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '25 days' + INTERVAL '9 hours 30 minutes', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) - INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '25 days' + INTERVAL '11 hours', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000059; -- ============================================ -- МАРТ 2026 (ТЕКУЩИЙ месяц) -- ============================================ -- 1000060: Весь день (3 марта) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '3 days', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '3 days' + INTERVAL '23 hours 59 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000060; -- 1000061: Несколько дней (10-14 марта, 5 дней) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '10 days', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '14 days' + INTERVAL '23 hours 59 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000061; -- 1000062: 2 часа (12 марта, 10:00-12:00) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '12 days' + INTERVAL '10 hours', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '12 days' + INTERVAL '12 hours', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000062; -- 1000063: 2 часа (17 марта, 14:30-16:30) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '17 days' + INTERVAL '14 hours 30 minutes', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '17 days' + INTERVAL '16 hours 30 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000063; -- 1000064: 2 часа (24 марта, 09:00-11:00) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '24 days' + INTERVAL '9 hours', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '24 days' + INTERVAL '11 hours', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000064; -- 1000065: 1.5 часа (28 марта, 15:00-16:30) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '28 days' + INTERVAL '15 hours', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '28 days' + INTERVAL '16 hours 30 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000065; -- ============================================ -- АПРЕЛЬ 2026 (СЛЕДУЮЩИЙ месяц) -- ============================================ -- 1000066: Весь день (1 апреля) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '1 day', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '1 day' + INTERVAL '23 hours 59 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000066; -- 1000067: Несколько дней (6-10 апреля, 5 дней) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '6 days', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '10 days' + INTERVAL '23 hours 59 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000067; -- 1000068: 2 часа (8 апреля, 10:00-12:00) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '8 days' + INTERVAL '10 hours', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '8 days' + INTERVAL '12 hours', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000068; -- 1000069: 4 часа (15 апреля, 13:30-17:30) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '15 days' + INTERVAL '13 hours 30 minutes', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '15 days' + INTERVAL '17 hours 30 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000069; -- 1000070: 2 часа (22 апреля, 09:30-11:30) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '22 days' + INTERVAL '9 hours 30 minutes', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '22 days' + INTERVAL '11 hours 30 minutes', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000070; -- 1000071: 2 часа (29 апреля, 14:00-16:00) UPDATE meeting SET start_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '29 days' + INTERVAL '14 hours', end_date_time = DATE_TRUNC('month', ${now}) + INTERVAL '1 month' + INTERVAL '29 days' + INTERVAL '16 hours', created_date = ${now}, updated_date = ${now} WHERE id = 1000071;
